title: Menorca Music Festival
description: Menorca's reference summer pop, rock and flamenco festival, held at the Recinte Firal d'Es Mercadal from 1 to 9 August 2026. The line-up brings together Víctor Manuel, Nina Pastori, Taburete, Loquillo, Antonio Orozco and God Save the Queen, with local artists each day. Line-up and dates indicative: confirm on the official site before buying tickets.
